templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Standard terms for artificial intelligence and machine learning services, addressing AI-specific risks, model training, and output ownership.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: HIPAA-compliant agreement for business associates handling protected health information (PHI), including obligations, safeguards, and breach notification requirements.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Comprehensive agreement for cloud-based software-as-a-service products, covering access, usage, support, data rights, and liability.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for early access design partner programs, including feedback obligations, intellectual property rights, and confidentiality terms.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: GDPR-compliant data processing agreement covering controller/processor relationships, subprocessor requirements, international transfers, and security incident response.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: Bilateral NDA for protecting confidential information shared during business discussions, partnerships, or transactions.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for partnership arrangements, covering obligations, payment terms, trademark licensing, and intellectual property rights.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for pilot programs allowing customers to evaluate a product before entering into a definitive agreement.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for professional services engagements, covering deliverables, statements of work, payment terms, and intellectual property transfer.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Agreement defining service level commitments, uptime targets, response times, and remedies including service credits.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for software licensing, covering license grants, restrictions, payment, updates, and termination terms.
